faqs.answer: Design fees typically range from $3,000 for a compact 10x10 to $60,000+ for large custom or double-deck structures. See our pricing guide table above for reference ranges. Contact us for a project-specific estimate based on your booth size, event, and brief.
faqs.question: How much does custom trade show booth design cost?

faqs.answer: A custom trade show booth is designed and built specifically for your brand. A modular booth uses a reusable system with updated graphics between events, faster and more cost-efficient for multi-event programs. We design and build both.
faqs.question: What is the difference between modular and custom booth design?

faqs.answer: From brief to approved 3D renders: 3–5 weeks. Fabrication lead time varies by complexity. For major international events, engage us 14–20 weeks before the show.
faqs.question: How long does the design process take?

faqs.answer: Yes. We extend your brand system, typefaces, colour palette, photography style, into a physical exhibition environment without losing consistency.
faqs.question: Can you work with our existing brand guidelines?

faqs.answer: Yes. Reuse planning is built into the design from the start. Many clients run the same booth system for 3–5 years with graphic updates, reducing cost per event by 30–50%.
faqs.question: Can the booth be reused at multiple events?

faqs.answer: Yes, full design-to-build service or design-only with production-ready files for your fabrication partner. You choose the scope.
faqs.question: Do you handle fabrication and build as well?

faqs.answer: GITEX, CES, MWC, AWS re:Invent, Dreamforce, Web Summit, ADIPEC, Money20/20, Hannover Messe, and major regional industry trade shows across all sectors and markets.
